Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova

Class FluxnovaTaskListenerImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.xml.impl.instance.ModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova.FluxnovaTaskListenerImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BpmnModelElementInstance, FluxnovaTaskListener, ModelElementInstance
public class FluxnovaTaskListenerImpl extends BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl implements FluxnovaTaskListener
The BPMN taskListener camunda extension element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
